'''Bioto''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Koorivar/Legends|Koorivar]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] from [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]], serving as the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Dead Ringer]]'' and a rival of [[Cash Garrulan]]. Garrulan framed Bioto, resulting in his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] being impounded by the ''[[Exactor/Legends|Exactor]]'' under the incorrect suspicion of carrying [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Jedi Purge]] survivors [[Roan Shryne]] and [[Olee Starstone]]. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] had Bioto thrown in the brig.

{{Char-stub}}
